message:
feat(rch): Comprehensive module improvements and test infrastructure

Major updates across RCH codebase including SSH handling, configuration,
hook processing, transfer logic, and test infrastructure improvements.

- Enhance rch-common with improved lib, SSH, and types modules
- Update command processing and configuration handling
- Improve hook execution and transfer logic
- Add comprehensive test assertions and fixtures
- Enhance UI job management in rchd
- Sync beads issue tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
